steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/plugin.php'; foreach ( array( 'woocommerce/woocommerce.php', 'plugin-check/plugin.php', 'draftpilot-for-woocommerce/draftpilot-for-woocommerce.php' ) as $p ) { $r = activate_plugin( $p ); if ( is_wp_error( $r ) ) { echo 'FAILED ' . $p . ': ' . $r->get_error_message(); } }
